# Metric Trust Pipeline

Redesigned report application.

## Setup

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Run

```bash
streamlit run app.py
```

## Project Structure

```
app.py
pages/
  1_Main.py
.streamlit/
  config.toml
requirements.txt
README.md
```

## Architecture

- **Main** (`pages/1_Main.py`): Main content
